name: Lanner Electronics Inc.
summary: Lanner Electronics Inc. provides design, engineering, and manufacturing services for advanced network appliances and rugged applied computing platforms for system integrators, service providers, and application developers worldwide. The company offers network appliances, such as modules and acceleration cards, white box hardware solutions, wide temperature network appliances, desktop network appliances, and rackmount network appliances; and telecom datacenter appliances consisting of cloud storage, HybridTCA, vCPE/uCPE, and video transport platforms, as well as modules and blades, and hyper-converged appliances. It also provides intelligent edge appliances, including DIN-Rail industrial gateway, edge AI appliance, embedded platform, intelligent video platform, rackmount industrial computer, rugged wireless gateway, vehicle gateway, and vehicle/rail computer; and extension modules comprising LTE radio modules. The company offers its products for use in various applications, such as network computing, telecommunication, transportation, power and energy, industrial automation, intelligent systems, software-defined wide area network, and edge AI applications. Lanner Electronics Inc. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
